topic: Auto-expiry alerts for work permits and visas — how the dashboard surfaces renewals 30/60/90 days out
format: Compare 'how most Oman businesses do X today' with 'how SmartPro Hub customers do X'
post:
An expired work permit discovered at the airport isn't a paperwork problem. It's a failure that started weeks earlier, when nobody caught it in time.

A spreadsheet column turns red. Maybe. If someone remembered to update it last month.

SmartPro Hub works differently.

The dashboard flags every expiring work permit and visa at 90, 60, and 30 days out — automatically. HR managers see it the moment they log in. No manual checking, no folder-diving, no discovering a visa expired last Tuesday when the employee is already at departures.

We built this because a missed renewal isn't just a fine. It's operational disruption, Ministry of Labour filings, and an employee who legally can't work while you sort out the mess.

Work permit tracking lives inside the same platform handling your WPS payroll Oman submissions and Omanization compliance. So deadlines don't fall through because they're sitting in a separate system nobody opens until something goes wrong.

Every deadline. One place. Caught before it becomes your problem.

If your current process relies on someone remembering — that's the gap.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
